output_format: Array of strings with comments removed
explanation: Process line by line. Keep a 'block comment' state. Handle '//' (line comment) and '/*' '*/' (block comment) carefully, especially when they span multiple lines or interact on the same line.

test_cases.input: ["/*Test program */", "int main()", "{ ", "  // variable declaration ", "int a, b, c;", "/* This is a test", "   multiline  ", "   comment for ", "   testing */", "a = b + c;", "}"]
["void main() {", " // single line", " /* block ", "    comment */", "  int a; ", "}"]
["main() {", "  int x; /* comment */", "  int y; // comment", "}"]
